messages.message: 'runId' is assigned a value but never used. Allowed unused vars must match /^_/u.
Unsafe assignment of an error typed value.

Unsafe argument of type error typed assigned to a parameter of type `{ memoryKey: string; runId?: string | null | undefined; personaId?: string | null | undefined; content: string; summary?: string | null | undefined; summaryModel?: string | null | undefined; ... 10 more ...; prompt?: string | ... 1 more ... | undefined; }`.
